title: Controlled LLM Training on Spectral Sphere

methodology.key_constraint: Spectral norms of weights and updates scale as Θ(√(d_out/d_in))

new_optimizer.name: SSO (Spectral Sphere Optimization)
new_optimizer.approach: Steepest descent constrained within spectral sphere geometry
new_optimizer.implementation: Constrained optimization in tangent space with Lagrange multiplier search and retraction step

key_findings: Conventional soft regularization methods are insufficient for long training horizons
Muon optimizer still exhibits unstable activations despite efficiency
SSO provides a mathematically unique solution that satisfies both steepest descent and μP constraints

guidelines: Optimal spectral radius to control activation scales

problem_addressed: Simultaneous optimization of convergence speed and fundamental stability in LLM training
